assessment_quizzes.title: Find Your Ideal Coach
assessment_quizzes.description: A short assessment that analyzes your goals, personality, and preferred coaching style to recommend a Top Match coach for career and personal growth.

assessment_quizzes.title: Leadership Focus Finder
assessment_quizzes.description: Identify your primary leadership strengths and development areas to match with the right leadership coach or program.

assessment_quizzes.title: Stress & Resilience Check-In
assessment_quizzes.description: Evaluate your current stress levels, coping strategies, and resilience patterns to get tailored stress-management recommendations.

assessment_quizzes.title: Team Dynamics Snapshot
assessment_quizzes.description: Designed for managers to quickly assess team collaboration, conflict patterns, and readiness for workshops.

coaches.name: Elena Martinez
coaches.bio: Elena is a certified career-change coach with 10+ years helping professionals pivot into more meaningful work without starting from scratch.

coaches.name: David Cho
coaches.bio: David specializes in productivity and systems thinking, helping knowledge workers design sustainable routines and focus habits.

coaches.name: Sophia Iyer
coaches.bio: Sophia is a stress-management and wellness coach blending mindfulness, CBT-informed tools, and practical planning.

coaches.name: Marcus Reed
coaches.bio: Marcus coaches emerging and mid-level leaders on communication, executive presence, and leading through change.

coaches.name: Julia Kim
coaches.bio: Julia helps professionals design strategic career changes, from industry pivots to returning to work after a break.

coaches.name: Liam Owens
coaches.bio: Liam focuses on conflict management and difficult conversations, coaching both individuals and managers.

coaches.name: Nora Sanchez
coaches.bio: Nora supports leaders driving organizational change, with a focus on stakeholder engagement and communication plans.

coaches.name: Hannah Patel
coaches.bio: Hannah coaches busy professionals on time management, prioritization, and realistic planning.

coaches.name: Michael Bauer
coaches.bio: Michael is a general personal growth coach specializing in building clarity, confidence, and values-based goals.

coaches.name: Amina Youssef
coaches.bio: Amina supports women leaders in tech and consulting with leadership presence, influence, and boundary-setting.

coaches.name: Tomoko Watanabe
coaches.bio: Tomoko blends time management and deep work practices to help clients reduce overwhelm and regain focus.

coaches.name: Rachel Green
coaches.bio: Rachel is a burnout-aware coach for high achievers who want sustainable stress management and self-compassion.

coaches.name: Omar Nasser
coaches.bio: Omar coaches senior managers on strategic leadership, influence across functions, and leading hybrid teams.

coaches.name: Isabel Rossi
coaches.bio: Isabel helps mid-career professionals design intentional career pivots and negotiate offers with confidence.

assessment_questions.text: What is your primary goal for working with a coach right now?
assessment_questions.help_text: For example: change careers, improve leadership, manage stress, or something else.

assessment_questions.text: Which statement best describes your biggest current challenge?
assessment_questions.help_text: Choose the option that feels closest, even if none are perfect.

assessment_questions.text: How soon are you hoping to see meaningful progress toward your goal?
Which session format do you prefer?
assessment_questions.help_text: Online video, in-person, or a mix (hybrid).

assessment_questions.text: What is your approximate budget per coaching session (in USD)?
assessment_questions.help_text: Your answer helps us suggest coaches whose rates are a good fit.

assessment_questions.text: What coaching style do you respond to best?
assessment_questions.help_text: For example: direct and challenging, warm and encouraging, structured and practical.

assessment_questions.text: When are you generally available for sessions?
assessment_questions.help_text: Mornings, afternoons, evenings, and weekend preferences help refine your match.

assessment_questions.text: Have you worked with a coach or therapist before?
assessment_questions.help_text: We use this to match you with coaches who specialize in newcomers or experienced clients.

assessment_questions.text: Which best describes your current role level?
assessment_questions.help_text: For example: individual contributor, new manager, senior leader, or executive.

assessment_questions.text: How many people do you directly manage today?
Which leadership area feels most important to strengthen right now?
assessment_questions.help_text: Examples: communication, conflict management, strategic thinking, or leading change.

assessment_questions.text: How do you prefer to learn new leadership skills?
assessment_questions.help_text: For example: practice and role-play, frameworks and models, or reflection and discussion.

assessment_questions.text: Over the past two weeks, how often have you felt overwhelmed by stress?
How satisfied are you with your current sleep quality?
assessment_questions.help_text: Consider both how long you sleep and how rested you feel.

assessment_questions.text: Which coping strategies do you currently rely on when stress rises?
assessment_questions.help_text: List or select from options like exercise, talking to friends, avoidance, or overworking.

assessment_questions.text: How many people are on your core team?
assessment_questions.help_text: Include direct reports and anyone you work with daily.

assessment_questions.text: How often does unproductive conflict show up in your team meetings?

coach_session_offerings.name: 30-Min Intro Career Coaching (Online)
coach_session_offerings.description: A short introductory session to clarify your goals, ask questions, and decide if career coaching with Elena is a good fit.

coach_session_offerings.name: Standard Career Coaching Session (60 min, Online)
coach_session_offerings.description: A full 60-minute session focused on designing and implementing your career change plan.

coach_session_offerings.name: Productivity Intro Session (30 min, Online)
coach_session_offerings.description: A focused introduction to David's productivity approach and a quick review of your current routines.

coach_session_offerings.name: Productivity Coaching (60 min, Online)
coach_session_offerings.description: A 60-minute working session to design systems, routines, and focus habits that fit your workload.

coach_session_offerings.name: Productivity Coaching (60 min, In-Person)
coach_session_offerings.description: In-person productivity coaching for clients based in the San Francisco Bay Area.

coach_session_offerings.name: Stress Reset Intro Session (30 min, Online)
coach_session_offerings.description: Meet Sophia, share your stress patterns, and explore whether her approach is right for you.

coach_session_offerings.name: Stress Management Session (45 min, Online)
coach_session_offerings.description: A 45-minute session combining practical planning with nervous-system-friendly tools.

coach_session_offerings.name: Leadership Chemistry Call (30 min)
coach_session_offerings.description: A short call to clarify your leadership goals and determine program or 1:1 fit.

coach_session_offerings.name: Leadership Coaching (60 min, Hybrid)
coach_session_offerings.description: A 60-minute leadership coaching session offered via video or on-site for local clients.

coach_session_offerings.name: Burnout Check-In (30 min, Online)
coach_session_offerings.description: A gentle 30-minute conversation to assess burnout risk and immediate next steps.

coach_session_offerings.name: Stress & Burnout Coaching (60 min, Online)
coach_session_offerings.description: Work through stress patterns, boundaries, and self-compassion practices in depth.

coach_session_offerings.name: Intro Personal Growth Session (30 min, Online)
coach_session_offerings.description: A low-cost introductory call to clarify your goals and experience Michael's coaching style.

coach_session_offerings.name: Personal Growth Coaching (60 min, Online)
coach_session_offerings.description: A 60-minute session to work on clarity, confidence, and values-aligned decisions.

coach_session_offerings.name: Time Management Coaching (60 min, Online)
coach_session_offerings.description: Weekly or bi-weekly sessions focused on prioritization, planning, and realistic routines.

coach_session_offerings.name: Strategic Career Pivot Session (60 min, Online)
coach_session_offerings.description: Dive into market research, positioning, and next steps for your career transition.

coach_session_offerings.name: Leadership Intro Session (30 min, Online)
coach_session_offerings.description: Explore your leadership goals and how coaching with Amina can support you.

assessment_answer_options.text: Make a significant career change or pivot
Grow as a leader or manager
I’ve never worked with a coach before
I’ve worked with a coach or therapist before
Occasionally stressed but generally coping well
Frequently overwhelmed or close to burnout
